title: Vivi Tries to Stop the War
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on vivi tries to stop the war, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Vivi Tries to Stop the War. Vivi’s desperate attempts to stop the fighting are drowned out by the chaos Crocodile engineered. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: The sand is... sucking me in!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Have you ever heard of a quicksand? It's quite a convenient desert grave, requiring no casket.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The sand is being sucked into the groundwater below, which I can sense with my powers...!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: There's not a single person in this world who can best me in a desert battle.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Gonna be buried by some stupid sand!

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: You never learn, do you... It's all futile.

summary: This part develops vivi tries to stop the war and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
